## What needs improving?
- File / page (e.g. `README.md`, `docs/agent.md`, `docs/oauth.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, or a header comment):

## Current state
What do the docs say now (or what is missing)?

## Suggested change
What should it say, and is there a relevant AT Protocol lexicon / spec to link to?
